entry.title: Re: 基于投资项目生成的在建工程固定资产科目

entry.title: How to create attended bot in SAP Build Process Automation Cloud Studio?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Do we have any option to create attended bot in SAP Build Process Automation Cloud Studio? How to maintain the desktop agent to that?

Thanks in advance,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation #Attended Bot #Create

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting Data Collection in brief
entry.content:
Hi all;

We are implementing GRDC, and we have successfully configured our destinations in BTP and Cloudconnnector.

Currently, we are extracting data from ECC to S4Hana using the GRDC application. However, when scheduling the job in the Run Data mapping app, we encounter an issue where the dropdown menu for selecting the target instance in the traceability log is empty.  : please find screenshot for your reference 

Also, we are unable to download the traceability log for selected items or for all items, and similarly, our import logs are empty as well. I have attached a screenshot for your reference.

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Rajeshwaran

entry.title: Re: In-Depth With SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Series - Register Now!

the system tells me I am not eligible for this course. (I tried the "SAP Mobile Start & SAP Start Update - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" session.) Who is eligible for these courses?

Best

Carsten

entry.title: Re: reCAPTCHA with CAP and UI5
entry.content:
Hi @WouterLemaire,

great blog! We use a destination to in our app to store the siteKey and secret. I CAP we access it via the SAP Cloud SDKs getDestination function.

const destination = await getDestination(RECAPTCHA_DESTINATION_NAME)
const reCaptchaSiteKey = destination.originalProperties.siteKey
const reCaptchaSecret = destination.originalProperties.secret

 Kind regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Pick datetime Bugs

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - How to create a hierarchy in th...
entry.content:
@sraji2486 

When you get the dimension and measure view from data file, if you create dimension table for the dimension you will see option to create the hierrachy

 

 

If model is already created without generating the dimension tables, you can open the model and select the field and then click generate dimension table.

Then go click on the dimension and then you have option to add hierarchies on right hand pane.

 

 

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: 基于投资项目生成的在建工程固定资产科目
entry.content:
客户您好，

如果是您自定的的asset class 并且已经勾选了investment measure 的确是可以的 或者asset class 4001 和 4011 也是可以 在 SSCUI 104255 配置的，但是 asset class 4010是系统默认的配置无法更改选择investment measure，所以asset class 4010是不可以的。

Best Regards,

Evelyn

entry.title: Re: Conversion to SAP S/4HANA Finance - Training Available in SAP Enterprise Support
entry.content:
Dear @simonlarkham05 

 If they like to do greenfield, SAP S/4HANA Finance Fundamentals, it will provide delta capabilities in finance.

In the session Conversion of Accounting for SAP S/4HANA they could also attend day 1 and day 3 of this EGI as it highlights Asset Accounting and Material ledger. The actual conversion is done on day 2.

Please let us know if you have further questions.

Best regards, Silvia

entry.title: Re: 基于投资项目生成的在建工程固定资产科目
entry.content: 好的，谢谢。

entry.title: Re: Creating Dimension Filter Using Dropdown
entry.content:
@ahfadoo 

try console.log on select variable to see whether its an array of string or string and then check what data type parameter setdimensionfilter accepts.

entry.title: Re: Paramter Check in Db2 (db6)
entry.content:
Hi Joachim,

we decided to change the Db2 V11.5 parameter note 2751102. The note now requires
ACT_SORTMEM_LIMIT=100
and we added a comment that the value 100 and NONE are synonyms for this parameter.
This is in line with the IBM documentation and should solve your problem.

Regards

                 Frank

entry.title: 项目的工时表可以其他人替代填写或EXCEL导入吗
entry.content:
Hi，

我创建了项目，并在APP-管理项目需求的资源页签创建了资源需求，并在资源分配中将工作包分配了具体员工，例如张三。

我使用张三的账号登录系统，在APP-管理我的工时表，可以看到分配给他的工作包，并进行工时填报。

我的疑问是：

1）其他人可以帮张三进行工时填写吗？在哪个APP，或者这个项目经理有权限吗？

2）可以使用EXCEL批量导入工时报工吗？

Just to wanted to know, if there is any feasibility to get email notifications upon successful completion of job in Data Actions. If so, what are the steps to configure to get this email notifications.

Please find below the screenshot for the same.

Appreciate for Quick response. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Link Asset to Project/WBS Element or Maintenance Order
entry.content:
Hello Rado,

AUC can be created/linked with WBS as soon as WBS is created. Same AUC can be inturn linked with final asset.

Check below blog for details. Hope this helps.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/auc-automatic-creation-from-wbs-s-4-hana/ba-p/13416770

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: SQL5137N error during System Rename
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

We are using DB2 on windows and doing System Rename. At the end of the stage we receive the error

I look at sapinst_dev and managed to get the root cause:

update dbm cfg using DIAGPATH \\ATSUGA\db2dumpBWD
SQL5137N The entry in the database manager configuration file for the
diagnostic directory path (diagpath) is invalid.

Please suggest to me how to resolve this error

Thank you

ZULFADZLY IQBAL

entry.title: Re: DMS storage category not filled and unable to edit wh...
entry.content:
Hi, 
from DMS application point of view there should be a pop-up raised to select the storage category when you mark the added original and then press the "Checkin" button. This pop-up should show all the storage categories maintained with document area "DMS" om transaction OACT.

Br

Christoph

entry.title: Re: Multiple target fields mapping at once | Standard iFl...
entry.content:
Hi Jwan,

Create the hashmaps and store the source fields and then create a graphical mapping, using a custom function i.e., get method you can map the the required fields from hashmap to their respective target fields.

You can refer the below blog: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/implementing-post-exit-of-installation-integration-flow-for-utilities/ba-p/13463407

Hope this helps you..

Regards,

Carol Pereira

entry.title: Re: Filter on ALV
entry.content: when the fieldcatalog-no_zero is set to X, the field is displayed without leading zeros, but in the filter you must input leading zeros; the other way around, if it is not set, the field is displayed with leading zeros, but in the filter you don't have to input leading zeros. very strange setting.

entry.title: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Craving to deploy your Cloud Foundry applications on Tomcat 10 runtime and make use of the latest and greatest Jakarta EE technologies? Got an app using Spring Boot and had to upgrade it to version 3.x due to Spring Boot 2.x EoL? Version 2.x of SAP BTP Security Services Integration Libraries is no longer sufficient as your applications require version 3.x? 

No more wait and fear! SAP Java Buildpack 2 is here!

 

NOTE:

  • This new major version of SAP Java Buildpack co-exists along with its older counterpart - from now on referred to as  SAP Java Buildpack 1 (SJB 1). 
  • For the time being, you can keep using SJB 1, but we highly recommend that you migrate your Java applications to SJB 2 at your earliest convenience. Deprecation plans for SJB 1 will be announced separately. 

Now, let's take a closer peek at the core features of SAP Java Buildpack 2:

  • The first release provides support for Java 17 (via SapMachine JRE 17). 
  • You can deploy Java applications on Tomcat 10.1.x. It implements Servlet 6.0, JSP 3.1, EL 5.0, WebSocket 2.1, and Authentication 3.0 specifications (the versions required by the Jakarta EE 10 platform).
  • You can use version 3.x of SAP BTP Security Services Integration Libraries. 
  • Our plans are to gradually add support for Java 21 as well as the latest version of the Apache TomEE runtime (adding support for even more Jakarta EE technologies). 

To use the new buildpack, refer to it in your manifest.yml or mtad.yml file, like this:

 

---
applications:
- name: <APP_NAME>
  buildpacks:
  - sap_java_buildpack_jakarta
  ...

 

Or specify it directly in the cf push command, like this:

 

cf push -f <PATH_TO_APP_MANIFEST> -b sap_java_buildpack_jakarta

 

To learn more, see the official documentation: SAP Java Buildpack 2

entry.title: Re: SSO Sign in for SAP BPA Workflow Automation
entry.content:
Hi Bobinfra,

did you had any luck finding out If the the SSO is possible with Process Automation?

BR,

Milan

entry.title: Principal Propogation, Event Mesh setup and User Context in CAP Nodejs application
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a landscape with SAP S4 on premise system  -> Connected to a Event Mesh service on BTP -> and a CAP NodeJS based application which is the consumer of the event received from S4 .

There is a principal propagation in place between BTP and S4.

When an event is raised from S4 , it reaches to the Message client in Event Mesh service on BTP. The CAP Nodejs based application is subscribed to the queue/topic of the same. It immediately receives the event and starts handling it in an event handler.

Now, during the processing within CAPM, it makes oData calls to the backend S4 via Principle Propagation and fetch some more data.

When running locally ( BAS ), this works fine because we have a user context available and that helps in making the connection with S4 via Principle Propagation.

However, If the app is deployed on the space, then even though the event is received successfully, the application cannot make calls to the backend because there is no user context available.

How can we make this work? We can pass the User Id via the event payload but how can we create/get a context out of a simple user id and pass it in the header while making oData calls ?

Please advice.

Br

Nilesh

entry.title: Re: Enable "convert to new ticket" for e-mails initiated...
entry.content:
Hello Deborah,

Can you please refer the SAP Note/KBA mention below :-

3005616 - Create New Service Ticket Option as Follow-Up Item Not Available in the Email Activity - SAP for Me

Hope this help, if yes- do set post as answered.

Best Regards,

Ankush Pashine

entry.title: Re: Configuration of standard SAP Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hi Deepak 

Yes there's all sorts of configuration and extension options that you can use. 

If you are focussed on the Multidimensional Reporting apps that use Web Dynpro ABAP .. you should take a look at SAP Fiori app F1572 Custom Analytical Queries which is where you can see how these are built and create your own versions of these - reusing the same data sources if you wish. 

And there's also some advice on how to extend the navigation in How to enable Intent-based Navigation for reporting with Web Dynpro Grid

For a broader understanding of what's possible across SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA, you might like to take a look at these references. 

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Yes you need SAP Fiori to Configure, Adapt and Extend SAP S/4HANA 

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – What is Key User Extensibility and Who are your Key Users

Extending SAP-delivered SAP Fiori elements apps using adaptation projects to create SAP S/4HANA app variants

If you are looking for training I would recommend bringing your team to 5 Steps to Fiori 

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – 5 Steps to Fiori Bootcamp for Customers

Best

Jocelyn

entry.title: Re: Build service failed community edition
entry.content:
Just another bump up here. @marihirvi . We are experiencing failing builds with the 4.9.150 runtime for the web platform for several days (if not weeks). 
For ios and android builds are currently successful, but the web has not yet been successful. 

Error: 
```

COMMAND:
NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=6000 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.150 -r
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.150 -r```

Please be kind to give any feedback or ETA of fix for this issue.

entry.title: Re: EWM Bulk Storage Type Setup, Putaway and Picking strategy
entry.content:
Hi Shailesh,

Best Regards,

Anil

entry.title: Creating Value Helps with only Javascript
entry.content:
Introduction

It's very time consuming to create fragments and then creating value helps. There are smart value help but it dosen't work with json models and also not easy to work with, so this blogs helps in creating value-helps with ease in Javascript.

Creating a Value Help Field

Let's create a product field and open a value help dialog from on click.

Data Model

View XML

 

 

<f:FormElement label="Customer Name">
    <f:fields>
        <m:Input value="{pageModel>/customer}" showValueHelp="true" valueHelpRequest=".onValueHelpRequest"/>
    </f:fields>
</f:FormElement>

 

Controller.js

 

onValueHelpRequest: async function (oEvent) {
    var pageModel = this.getView().getModel("pageModel");
    if (!this._valueHelpDialog) {
        this._valueHelpDialog = await CG.createValueHelp({
            title: "Customers",
            model: this.getView().getModel(),
            multiSelect: true,
            keyField: "CustomerID",
            keyDescField: "ContactName",
            basePath: "/Customers",
            preFilters: [
                {
                    path: "CustomerID",
                    operator: sap.ui.model.FilterOperator.Contains,
                    values: [
                        "ANT"
                    ]
                }
            ],
            columns: [
                {
                    label: "Customer Id", path: "CustomerID"
                },
                {
                    label: "Contact Name", path: "ContactName"
                }
            ],
            ok: function (selectedRow) {
                pageModel.setProperty("/Customer", selectedRow.ContactName);
            }
        });
        this.getView().addDependent(this._valueHelpDialog);
    }
    this._valueHelpDialog.open();
}

 

Create a UI like this

If you have followed, we used a method called CG.createValueHelp(config).

Let's create this method now.

 

sap.ui.define([
        "sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel",
        "sap/ui/Device",
        "sap/ui/comp/filterbar/FilterBar",
        "sap/ui/comp/filterbar/FilterGroupItem",
        "sap/ui/mdc/FilterField",
        "sap/ui/model/Filter",
        "sap/ui/model/FilterOperator",
        "sap/base/util/uid",
        "sap/ui/comp/valuehelpdialog/ValueHelpDialog",
        "sap/m/Button",
        "sap/ui/comp/smartfilterbar/SmartFilterBar",
        "sap/ui/comp/smarttable/SmartTable",
        "sap/ui/core/CustomData",
        "sap/m/FlexItemData",
        "sap/f/DynamicPage",
        "sap/f/DynamicPageHeader",
        "sap/m/Dialog",
        "sap/ui/table/Table",
        "sap/ui/table/Column"
    ],
    /**
     * provide app-view type models (as in the first "V" in MVVC)
     *
     *  {typeof sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel} JSONModel
     *  {typeof sap.ui.Device} Device
     *
     * @returns {Function} createDeviceModel() for providing runtime info for the device the UI5 app is running on
     */
    function (JSONModel, Device,
              FilterBar, FilterGroupItem,
              FilterField, Filter, FilterOperator,
              uid, ValueHelpDialog, Button,
              SmartFilterBar, SmartTable, CustomData,
              FlexItemData, DynamicPage, DynamicPageHeader, Dialog, Table, Column) {
        "use strict";

        ValueHelpDialog.prototype.cgAddFilters = function (filters) {
            for (let filter of filters) {
                let path = filter.path;
                const filterField = this.dialogMetadata.columns[path].filterField;
                filterField.setConditions([filter]);
                this.dialogMetadata.columns[path].filterValues.push(filter);
                this.getFilterBar().fireSearch();
            }
        }

        return {
            createDeviceModel: function () {
                var oModel = new JSONModel(Device);
                oModel.setDefaultBindingMode("OneWay");
                return oModel;
            },

            createValueHelp: async function (config) {
                const groupName = uid();
                const filterGroupItems = [];
                const dialogMetadata = {
                    columnDefinition: config.columns,
                    columns: {},
                    filterId2ColId: {}
                }
                for (let colDef of config.columns) {
                    const searchFieldId = groupName + colDef.path;
                    dialogMetadata.columns[colDef.path] = {
                        searchFieldId: searchFieldId,
                        filterValues: [],
                    };
                    dialogMetadata.filterId2ColId[searchFieldId] = colDef.path;
                    const oFilterField = new FilterField({
                        id: searchFieldId,
                        defaultOperator: sap.ui.model.FilterOperator.Contains,
                        change: function (oEvent) {
                            const filterID = oEvent.getSource().getId();
                            const colId = dialogMetadata.filterId2ColId[filterID];
                            dialogMetadata.columns[colId].filterValues = oEvent.getParameter("conditions");
                            console.log(dialogMetadata);
                        }
                    });
                    filterGroupItems.push(new FilterGroupItem({
                        groupName: sap.ui.comp.filterbar.FilterBar.INTERNAL_GROUP,
                        name: colDef.path,
                        label: colDef.label,
                        control: oFilterField
                    }));
                    dialogMetadata.columns[colDef.path].filterField = oFilterField;
                }

                let dialog = new ValueHelpDialog({
                    draggable: false,
                    title: config.title,
                    supportMultiselect: config.multiSelect,
                    supportRanges: false,
                    key: config.keyField, // Specify the key field
                    descriptionKey: config.keyDescField, // Specify the description field
                    filterBar: new FilterBar({
                        isRunningInValueHelpDialog: false,
                        advancedMode: true,
                        filterBarExpanded: true,
                        filterGroupItems: filterGroupItems,
                        search: function (oEvent) {
                            var oBinding = dialog.getTable().getBinding();
                            const filter = [];
                            for (let columnId in dialogMetadata.columns) {
                                let conditions = dialogMetadata.columns[columnId].filterValues;
                                for (let cond of conditions) {
                                    if (!cond.isEmpty) {
                                        filter.push(new sap.ui.model.Filter(columnId,
                                            FilterOperator[cond.operator],
                                            cond.values));
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            if (filter.length > 0) {
                                oBinding.filter(new sap.ui.model.Filter({
                                    filters: filter,
                                    and: false
                                }));
                            } else {
                                oBinding.filter()
                            }
                        }
                    }), ok: function (oEvent) {
                        var token = oEvent.getParameter("tokens");
                        if (token.length > 0) {
                            if (config.multiSelect) {
                                var selectedRows = token.map(item => item.data().row)
                                console.log("Selected Row", selectedRows);
                                dialog.close();
                                if (config.ok) {
                                    config.ok(selectedRows);
                                }
                            } else {
                                token = token[0];
                                // Handle the selected value
                                var selectedRow = token.data().row;
                                console.log("Selected Row", selectedRow);
                                dialog.close();
                                if (config.ok) {
                                    config.ok(selectedRow);
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        // console.log(token);

                    }, cancel: function (oEvent) {
                        // Handle the case when the user cancels the dialog
                        // You can add any specific logic or reset values here
                        dialog.close();
                    }.bind(this)
                });

                // Create a Table to display the data
                var oTable = await dialog.getTableAsync();

                oTable.setModel(config.model);
                if (oTable.bindRows) {
                    for (let colDef of config.columns) {
                        oTable.addColumn(new sap.ui.table.Column({label: colDef.label, template: colDef.path}));
                    }
                    oTable.bindRows(config.basePath);
                } else {
                    const cells = [];
                    for (let colDef of config.columns) {
                        oTable.addColumn(new sap.m.Column({header: new sap.m.Label({text: colDef.label})}));
                        cells.push(new sap.m.Text({text: `{${colDef.path}}`}));
                    }
                    oTable.bindItems(config.basePath, new sap.m.ColumnListItem({
                        cells: cells
                    }));
                }
                dialog.dialogMetadata = dialogMetadata;
                if (config.preFilters) {
                    dialog.cgAddFilters(config.preFilters);
                }
                dialog.update();
                // dialog.setTable(oTable);
                return dialog;
            },
        };
    });

 

Conclusion

In summary, we explored creating value help fields in SAPUI5 using JavaScript. By enabling users to open a value help dialog for customer names, we enhance user experience and streamline data selection. Remember to adapt the code snippets to your specific use case.

entry.title: Re: the create function does not working by using (business API) in RAP application
entry.content:
i already typed this code:

and i got this error:

is that has to do with the "Behavior Definition" or "Metadata Extentions"?

entry.title: Re: Different result when call BAPI Create MO (IW31)
entry.content:
I assume we are talking about BAPI "BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN" ...?
You should check a few things first :

  • First off, the "ERRORS"-Section in your Image shows a variety of ErrorMessages ('IW 431', 'IW 437', ...), the "WARNINGS"-Section shows only one Specific type 'IW 437' => Is this correct, meaning you only get the Error when Messages other than the 'IW 437' are generated? If so, you should focus on the "Start date is in the past"-Message ...
  • These Date-related Messages are related to the Order Scheduling Configuration for the OrderType ... Can you confirm that the Customizing such as Trx. "OPU7" is the same in the environments for the OrderTypes across Systems? You are using the same OrderType in the BAPI across Systems, right?
  • Also, the Factory-Calender in the Systems has an influence. Are they the same in Dev, QA & Prod? Please check this, possibly put a BREAK on the FunctionMode "DATE_CONVERT_TO_FACTORYDATE" when executing your Web Call and check any Messages generated in the next lines of code ...
  • In general, you should do a WHERE-USED via Trx."SE91" on Messages like 'IW 437' and 'IW 431' and identify where they are generated. Put a BREAKPOINT there and you can find out what is going wrong and why ...

With limited info, I would focus on the 'IW 431 - Start date is in the past'-Message, because in some cases it does lead to an Error, while the Workday-calculation would generate a Warning ...
Chances are some minor difference in Customizing / FactoryCalendar / ... ór in your Web-Call generates one or more Messages, of which the 'IW 431' will show up as an Error ...

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: SQL5137N error during System Rename
entry.content: I think the root cause is because we cannot access \\ATSUGA\db2dumpBWD

entry.title: Re: Not able to see purchasing organisation
entry.content:
Hi Tkokate,

Purchase organisation is maintained in SPRO under Central Procurement - Settings in Hub system - Define company code, Plant, Purchasing organisation for connected system.

Please ensure that these entries are activated.

Regards

Deepak

entry.title: Re: Error on from learning exercise : SAP Business Application Studio - step 7
entry.content: When you create the user UPS_GRANTOR earlier, you have to have thew same password as in this later tutorial when creating datebase connector. Then the error is no more

entry.title: Must specify table to select from in Exec saved procedure
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on SAP B1 10 , SQL 2017

When I execute this Query : 

DECLARE @M1 AS varchar(10)
SET @M1 = '20240301'
Exec [dbo].[GIP_SIT_J] @M1
SELECT * FROM [dbo].[@GIP_SIT_J]

It runs OK ; But when I try to use parameters Like this :

--SELECT * FROM OIGE T0 WHERE T0.[DocDate] = [%cs1]
DECLARE @M1 AS varchar(10)
SET @M1 = [%cs1]
Exec [dbo].[GIP_SIT_J] @M1
SELECT * FROM [dbo].[@GIP_SIT_J]

I get Error : Must Specify Table to Select From .....

Thanks for helping to solve this issue.

entry.title: Re: How to avoid changing amount by data action for data...
entry.content:
Hello all,

One question, if I want to copy all the data from one version to another, and both are in the same model. And the data I want to copy have locked data (actual months) and open data (planning monthts). I see that also locked data is changing. Should be possible? 

Is there any way to overwrite only open data? Because both versions, in this case has the same data locked and open.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content: Wonderful news. I suppose JCo is supported with SJB 2. Is it not?

entry.title: Re: Paramter Check in Db2 (db6)
entry.content: Hi Frank, Thanks a lot for the fast and smart solution. So my Fixpack Check will be clean.

entry.title: Open GRPO Xml to be converted as AP Invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an Open GRPO in XML file, I want to import that XML file as AP Invoice.

Can you please tell me how I can do it?

With Regards,

Samudra Gupta

entry.title: Re: Creating Dimension Filter Using Dropdown
entry.content: Hi Nikhil, I managed to figure out that the variable was bringing in a array and that the type was incorrect. Once I fixed it it managed to work just fine. Thank you so much for your help!

entry.title: Re: From C4C how can i get the TOTAL Ticket attachment co...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can follow the below step via C4C UI :-

1.Go to Library work center ->Attachment view ->All ->Go to Advance filter

2.Search with Object type as 'Ticket' and Object Id (Ticket Id).

=>You will be able to see different attachment types within this Ticket.

Do set it as answered if it helped !

Best Regards,

Ankush Pashine

entry.title: Re: CL_LSAPI_MANAGER - Shell dependent navigation
entry.content:
Hello,

I encountered problem with fiori app which has link created by this class, that when I federated that app to the SAP BTP Workzone - the links are displayed as a plain text instead of links. Is there a way how to handle that?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

Happy to join from Paris, France. 🙂

entry.title: SAP Cutover Plan
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Can anyone please mention the list of Cut-over activities/tasks that has to be addressed when moving from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4 HANA?

entry.title: I have an issue that allows orders to be confirmed despite the shortage of stocks.
entry.content: There was no shortage reported on specific material on any of the processed orders although there was not enough available stock to cover all of them. What is usually the cause of this issue and what is the first thing to be check? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Enter valid tax code
entry.content:
Without any additional information, it is almost impossible to give some guidance. Where do you enter the tax code? Are you trying to define a new tax code in the tax configuration UI? If yes, could it be that indeed the tax code already exists in your tenant? In this case, perhaps "edit tax code" would be the best way to go, or you select a different 2-character combination to define your new tax code.

Or do you enter a tax code while posting a business document?

Best regards, Holger Gebert

entry.title: Re: How to avoid changing amount by data action for data...
entry.content: Data locks do not apply to users with the admin role, or the user who created the model. These users can import data, delete data, and publish their changes to public versions, even if it affects locked data.

entry.title: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel stopped
entry.content:
Hello,

we have migrated our old APO to a new OS and updated to APO SCM 7.0 EHP 4 with Live Cache.

If i try to access the WebGUI, via http (port 8000) and as well via https (port 8001), i got a ""Application Server Error" HTML Error 

503 Service Not Available

Tenant runlevel stopped

To enable WebGUI i have set Parameters for Ports pointing to https/8001 and http/8000 and restarted the server. Access to that ports is fine.

Then i have followed that manual 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-configure-web-gui-for-sap/ba-p/13208789

 

Could someone point me to where the problem is coming from? What "Tenant" is the error message pointing to?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Multiple target fields mapping at once | Standard iFl...
entry.content:
Hey Carol,

Thank you for your help here. The only thing I need is achieving to map multiple target fields at once as shown in the screenshot. Can this be done easily? 

 

BR
Jwan

entry.title: Starting SAP SD career with siebel CRM experience
entry.content:
Hi All

I'm currently working for siebel CRM and would like to learn SAP SD module

Please suggest better ways , whether we can learn online or institution

entry.title: Re: Download msg-file to an C4C e-mail
entry.content:
Hello Deborah,

1.Go to Library work center ->Attachment view -> All Attachment ->Advance filter

2.Filter with Ticket as Object and it's ID, click on Go button.

=>From the list of attachment available for the ticket, select an attachment and click on the Download' button.

Do set the post as answered, if helps.

Best Regards,

Ankush Pashine

entry.title: Re: The Future is Now: Reflections on SAP Data Unleashed 2024
entry.content:
I hope that the use of AI will make people understand that the fundamental pillar of all this is data, and that this will lead to more work on making it easier to load data into DSP.
Integrated loading processes, variable passing, control functions, flow control, ... something that already exists for example in SAP Data Services.

Because without data, AI is useless.

entry.title: Understanding of Java Heap Dump Alert
entry.content:
Hello team,


We got an alert Java heap dump with the value 7 but from instance level we can see only 4 .hprof files,need to understand how the alert will be caluclated for heap dumps


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Understanding of Java Heap Dump Alert
entry.content:
Number of Heap Dumps metric is reading under

Folder: \Q/usr/sap/${LMDB}SAP_J2EEEngineClusterInstance->SAP_J2EEEngineCluster.SAPSystemName$/${COMPLEX}INSTANCE.NAME$/j2ee/cluster\E

Filepattern: search by file pattern .*hprof

entry.title: Re: Report is loading message on SAP B1 web client
entry.content:
Hi TusharNathvani,

You can create an incident for SAP Business One Support Team under the component SBO-REP-CR to get it investigated.

Mention the SAP KBA 3409996 and link of this discussion while creating the incident.

You will not be able to access SAP KBA 3409996 as it is currently being updated.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Understanding of Java Heap Dump Alert
entry.content: Parameters like ${LMDB}SAP_J2EEEngineClusterInstance->SAP_J2EEEngineCluster.SAPSystemName$ are being replaced in runtime, you can check the value through Transaction MAI_TOOLS / Alerting Directory Browser service. In Navigation by, you can filter by Managed Object type and enter the Managed Object Name, then select for example a technical System named FT7SYS(ABAP), then: Under Metrics tab you can select the metric and review parameters in data collection tab You can check directly Collector Parameter Variables section. More information about Data Provider File Information used in Number of heap dumps metric: This data provider checks file attributes of one or more files in a specific folder location. Metric Parameters: FOLDER (mandatory): Absolute full path to the folder containing the files to be monitored. Wild cards are not possible. FILEPATTERN (mandatory): Regular expression to filter for file names. KEY_FIG (mandatory): File attribute to be returned. Possible values are: Count: Number of files matching the given file pattern MaxSize: Size of the biggest file matching the file pattern in bytes MaxSize_KB: Size of the biggest file matching the file pattern in kilobytes MaxSize_MB: Size of the biggest file matching the file pattern in megabytes MaxSize_GB: Size of the biggest file matching the file pattern in gigabytes MinSize: Size of the smallest file matching the file pattern in bytes MinSize_KB: Size of the smallest file matching the file pattern in kilobytes MinSize_MB: Size of the smallest file matching the file pattern in megabytes MinSize_GB: Size of the smallest file matching the file pattern in gigabytes TotalSize: Sum of file sizes matching the file pattern in bytes TotalSize_KB: Sum of file sizes matching the file pattern in kilobytes TotalSize_MB: Sum of file sizes matching the file pattern in megabytes TotalSize_GB: Sum of file sizes matching the file pattern in gigabytes LastModified: File matching the file pattern that is modified latest as long (milliseconds since 01.01.1970) AgeLastModified: File matching the file pattern that is modified latest as difference of current time and the modification date in seconds. FirstModified: File matching the file pattern that is modified earliest as long (milliseconds since 01.01.1970) FolderAgeLastModified: Returning the difference of current time and the modification date in seconds for specified FOLDER. RECURSIVE (optional - default value is FALSE): Specifies if the sub folders should also be taken into account. DATEPATTERN (optional - default value is "yyyy-MM-dd"): Pattern to be applied as date format for supported variables $TODAY$ and $YESTERDAY$ in mandatory parameter FILEPATTERN. An example for the DATAPATTERN would be e.g.: yyyy-MM-dd Meaning of the different chars: y: year - allowed is either yyyy or yy => stands for e.g. 2016 or 16 M: month - allowed is only MM => stands for e.g. 10 d: day - allowed is either dd or d => stands for e.g. 07 or 7 Allowed characters for separating year, month and day are: _ (underline) - (dash) . (point) no separator All permutations are possible e.g.: yy-d-MM dd_MM_yyyy MM.dd.yyy Example for a FILEPATTERN making use of e.g. variable $TODAY$ could be: example_$TODAY$\.log.* This gets replaced during runtime e.g. by example_2016-10-07\.log.* Keep in mind that metric has an standard collection interval of 15 minutes, so if situation changes in corresponding folder (number of files changes during next data collection) it will take 15 minutes to update it.

entry.title: Re: Question about email send out when copying class
entry.content:
Hi Lik,

that the checkbox is marked is very stupid. If you copy a class all agenda sequences, instructors and classrooms will be copied into the new class an if the checkbox is marked the instructor will receive all information from the old class for the new class. It is better you deactivate the checkbox before you copy the class. Then modify everything in the new class. When you have finished, send the instructor a mail using actions in the class.

Regards
Guido

entry.title: Re: My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud – Your business Insights at a glance.
entry.content: If you create a card from a List Report, has that Card been created somewhere in that application or elsewhere? Or can you create these cards "on the fly" via "Add Card to Insights"?

entry.title: purchase responcible
entry.content:
Hello friends
I ran into a problem. Is it possible to specify a person as the person responsible for the purchase while creating the purchase request, so that later only that person will be responsible for creating the purchase order?

purchase responsible as a feild in pr 

 

thanks regard

entry.title: Re: SAP User Experience Update: What’s New for SAP S/4HANA 2023 (Private Cloud and On-Premise)
entry.content: Is the new MyHome still planned for SAP S/4HANA 2023 (on-premise) in Q1/2024?

entry.title: Re: Business Partner configuration while doing conversion from ECC to HANA.
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing, much appreciated.

Kind regards,

Alaa Afifi

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Happy to have you here in SAP Community @Adeem - maybe you already know about the Paris group? You could connect locally there and learn about events nearby!

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023
entry.content:
Hello @pardhreddyc 

The permit management in PTW(the new solution with Fiori) or the classical one with WCM caters to the overall permit solution (creation, preparation, implementing safety controls, approval, print out, handout and closure). This is typically required by oil n gad, chemicals, utility type industry.

When it comes to order integration, you can connect the order- operations with one or more permit. However, order release is not intended to be controlled by permit management. One can automate setting "Order IN Process - EXEC status" within WCM setup, but not restrict order release. Order release is more guided by the maintenance and logistics processes (for ex. Procurement of a high lead item material may depend on early release of work order etc).

One can develop custom checks to control “order release” based on a processing state of the permit in WCM.

Hope it helps.

Arvind

entry.title: Re: Using ALV, Can I display multiple sales document that...
entry.content:
Yes it is possible, you need use conditional loop to search all sales orders related to the material number,  use append statement to add all related records once finished use Modify statement otherwise your internal tale it will keep one record only (your current scenario) 

example logic using 2 loops: 

Loop AT it_output INTO WA_it_output
LOOP AT it_salesdoc WHERE (  matnr =  WA_it_output-matnr  ) INTO  wa_it_salesdoc_final

APPEND wa_it_salesdoc to it_salesdoc_final.

ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.
MODIFY it_salesdoc_final.

You may achieve the same result with different approach you are not limited to the above. 

Please reward if it was helpful.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Show Popup after O...
entry.content: @N1kh1l any Ideas?

entry.title: Re: B1IF 2.0 - Add records into UDT type no object via ServiceLayer
entry.content: Dear Ankit CHAUHAN, Thanks...

entry.title: Re: I've got problems with CPILint , I need HELP !!
entry.content: Happy to help! I'm adding an FAQ to GitHub and this is one of the questions. Basically, after the unified Integration Suite UI, you can no longer copy the hostname from the browser on Cloud Foundry. Instead. you have to copy it from a service key. The approach is described here: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/http-calls-and-uri-components

entry.title: Re: Enable "convert to new ticket" for e-mails initiated...
entry.content: Unfortunately, this is not helping... The resolution is my description of the system behaviour for customer emails. Nothing described to employee emails...

entry.title: Re: Check Printing with multiple printers
entry.content:
Hi Barry ,

to answer your question straight away yes it is possible to print checks in different locations via Output rules.

Additionally for checks in my bank accounts you can assign different queues for different check lots.

I hope that answers the question a bit.

Best regards

Didi

entry.title: Key Takeaways from Rise Into the Future Event: What You Need to Know
entry.content:
Recently, the Rise Into the Future event showcased the success stories of leading companies that made the move to the cloud and reaped the benefits of increased agility and innovation. 

In this blog, we will delve into the key takeaways from the event and explore how these organizations thrived in the digital era by embracing RISE with SAP. 

 

Hear RISE with SAP from customer stories from different industries 

Several world-renowned SAP customers across various industries were highlighted in the virtual event showcasing their successful transition to the cloud: 

  • Nestlé consolidated their data into SAP RISE data centers, resulting in improved system availability and agility for their 273,000 employees. 
  • Inchcape, a major automotive distributor, experienced a 40-50% increase in system communication speed and improved customer service through cloud solutions.  
  • Mahindra focused on modernizing their operations with RISE with SAP, resulting in increased developer efficiency and faster time to market.  
  • Versuni, a consumer products company, re-implemented all systems with RISE with SAP, enabling greater responsiveness and continuous technology adoption.  

Each company reported significant benefits from their migration to the cloud. 

 

How can I reach my sustainability goals? 

Modern businesses are facing increasing pressure from customers, investors, employees, and regulators to follow strict emission mandates and tight regulations. With this pressure from various stakeholders that all demand to prioritize sustainability and more environmental responsibility, companies are turning to technologies to help them track and manage their sustainability efforts.  

SAP’s Jan Gilg explained that “With Green Ledger, SAP S/4HANA Cloud becomes the heart of the sustainable enterprise. This enables businesses to monitor the costs upfront, prompting them to make key decisions about the value chain more proactively.” 

It is clear that by tintegrating sustainability practices into their core operations, businesses not only meet regulatory mandates but also lead the way for a more environmentally conscious future. 

 

The answer is always AI, what’s the question? 

SAP’s new generative AI assistant, Joule was also showcased at the event, showing how it is integrated across SAP's entire enterprise portfolio. This enables businesses to eliminate repetitive and time-consuming tasks for their employees, enhancing processes from human resources to finance, supply chain, procurement, and customer experience. 

SAP’s Jan Gilg explained: “We are committed to helping your business drown out the noises and challenges associated with running a successful business. For example, liquidity challenges, supply chain fragility, rising energy costs, talent shortages, or changing government regulations amid geopolitical tensions.” 

With Rise with SAP, users can leverage the cloud technologies delivered by SAP and our partners and make use of the benefits of enhanced flexibility, agility, scalability, and cost-effectiveness. to thrive in dynamic business environments.  

 

That sounds easy, but how exactly?  

The recently announced RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization Program was spotlighted as the methodology to help customers optimize, orchestrate, integrate, and automate.  

Eric Van Rossum, SAP's Chief Marketing Officer for Cloud ERP explained: “They need to drive the tangible business outcome, and that changes a lot depending on whether a customer is coming from ECC, or they've already started their S/4 journey, whether on-premises or with a hyperscale”. Van Rossum continued, “The second barrier is the cost associated with infrastructure, services, and maintenance. We are addressing both challenges with the RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization Program.”. 

Every SAP customer’s journey to cloud ERP is different. The expanded RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization Program acknowledges and celebrates these differences. 

As Navneet Mirshra, Global Head of Service Portfolio and Strategy for Cloud ERP explained, “No matter what industry or segment customers belong to, we hear loud and clear from them about the need for a business case, predictability of scale, and return on investment.” 

 

What about ‘Clean Core’? 

“The clean core concept is a mindset.” says Navneet Mishra. It focuses on modern design approaches for business processes, integration scenarios, and data architecture in a stable and transparent platform. A clean core allows for faster software deployment and easier adoption of updates, while also helping to minimize technical debt and prepare organizations for maximizing strategic benefits and cost savings. 

 

“We're committed to helping customers drive tangible business outcomes and reduce costs so they can move forward with confidence.” 

- Eric Van Rossum, SAP's Chief Marketing Officer for Cloud ERP 

 

What does the future of ERP look like?  

There was a great panel of experts who delved into the essential components of successful business transformation: process, people, and products. McKinsey’s Rob Cain emphasized the crucial role of Gen AI and shed light on the importance of strategic decision-making by leveraging cutting-edge technologies to stay ahead in today's competitive marketplace. 

Cain further added: “CEOs and boards are increasingly looking to technology, both legacy investments in technology and potential future investments in technology and digital, especially with Gen AI.”  

Many companies follow traditional innovation cycles and methods for generating ideas and developing products, but they are increasingly embracing technology tools for driving business transformation. Cain explained that the second thing that CEOs and the C-level suite look for is the technology to drive increased productivity to drive greater forms of automation and create opportunities for insights to quicken decision-making. Lastly, the third bucket is the ability to leverage technology for innovation. And ERP is a foundational glue that ties these elements. 

The best boardroom chats should not just be about how to use AI technology, but also about its impact. Executives need to consider how it will affect their customers, employees, community, and the environment. It's important to not only think about how to benefit from AI but also about how to use it responsibly. 

 

How can RISE with SAP migration help? 

In the event, we learnt how the RISE with SAP migration and modernization program helps customers drive tangible business outcomes with their cloud transformation and reduce the associated costs. This migration program is about much more than just moving from on-premise to the cloud.  

Geoff Scott, CEO and Act Evangelist said: “It's also about business process rejuvenation and business process modernization. It's about opening possibilities for your businesses with new technologies, making sure that your business processes match up to what SAP is doing, and making sure that as a customer.” 

A high-tech company Lexmark, one of the event speakers, wanted to improve visibility through greater automation and standardization and get the full benefits of the cloud hyperscalers in terms of stability and security. The company went live in August 2023.  

Yves Gautier, IT director and Lead of the SAP Excellency Team at Lexmark said: “Our SAP S/4HANA database production size was pretty large, around six terabytes for ECC and for BW. SAP at that time had just released a HANA large instance on Microsoft Azure. So, this was the ideal sheet for our complex needs as it was already architected and operationalized by SAP.”  

With the initial migration and the software subscription corresponding to the new needs, Lexmark achieved a %15 reduction of the ongoing total cost of ownership. With Rise with SAP migration, Lexmark harmonized all operating systems with consistent database releases and brought up-to-date support packs. 

SAP is committed to helping your business drown out the noises and challenges associated with running a successful business. With Rise with SAP, you can improve your business processes and consume innovations faster than ever before. Want to learn more? Make sure to watch the Rise Into The Future on demand now! 

 

USEFUL LINKS:

Getting Innovation Ready with Cloud ERP by Eric Van Rossum

Streamline Your Journey to the Cloud with the RISE with SAP Methodology by Peter Baskin

Partners Are Vital to Your Company’s Success When Transitioning to Cloud ERP by George LeBron

entry.title: Re: Generate PFX file to connect SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Mahesh,

Thanks for putting efforts and publishing very detailed steps as an alternative to the steps provided in help document. I am currently getting error while I am trying to ping web service, I have created in SOAMANAGER for Romania E Document Invoice process. 

I am getting below error:

SRT Framework exception: Service Ping ERROR: Error when calling SOAP Runtime functions: SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("SSL handshake with drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_P

Service Ping ERROR: Error when calling SOAP Runtime functions: SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("SSL handshake with drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED (

Error when processing Web service call

Error when calling SOAP Runtime functions: SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("SSL handshake with drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED (-102)Peer's X.509 certificate (chain) validation failed (missing trust?)SapSSLSessionStartNB()==SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED  SSL:SSL_read() failed  (536872221/0x2000051d)  => "Failed to verify peer certificate. Peer not trusted."  SSL:SSL_get_state()==0x2131 "TLS read server certificate B"  SSL NI-hdl 250: local=10.193.2.45:29187  peer=52.29.58.141:443  cli SSL session PSE "I:\usr\sap\BDV\D27\sec\SAPSSLC.pse" (load=Sat Mar  2 21:00:06 2024, rcnt= 0)  SSL_CTX ciphersuites=150:PFS:HIGH::EC_P256:EC_HIGH  Client SSL_CTX 000001EFF5C2E4A0 pvflags=896 (TLSv1.2,TLSv1.1,TLSv1.0)  TLSextSNI server_name="drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com"  Target Hostname="drcc-test.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com">> ---- SecuSSL ErrStack: ----Peer not trusted----- BEGIN VERIFICATION RESULT ----- # --- Messages ----------- ERROR: The verified certificate chain is complete but no certificate is trusted. # --- Summary ----------- #01 Certificate (End Entity): VALID  Subject:                      CN=*.a1c4955.kyma.ondemand.com  Issuer:                       EMAIL=support@fortinet.com, CN=FGVM040000173702, OU=Certificate Authority, O=Fortinet, L=Sunnyvale, SP=California, C=US  Fingerprint (SHA256):         44:0B:84:3A:67:7E:99:8A:44:AA:F3:26:7C:F3:D6:38:83:D0:50:08:8F:21:A0:DB:90:6D:1C:A1:5E:38:A3:16  Validity:                     Sat Feb 24 23:06:50 2024 / Fri May 24 23:06:49 2024  PKI validation:               FAILED: Validation of dependents - Issuer Certificate (Issuer - Only Invalid Certificates Found) #02 Certificate (Issuer):     VALID  Subject:                      EMAIL=support@fortinet.com, CN=FGVM040000173702, OU=Certificate Authority, O=Fortinet, L=Sunnyvale, SP=California, C=US  Issuer:                       EMAIL=support@fortinet.com, CN=FGVM040000173702, OU=Certificate Authority, O=Fortinet, L=Sunnyvale, SP=California, C=US  Fingerprint (SHA256):         FD:D0:72:64:60:CF:A3:E8:87:BC:23:89:35:17:5B:CB:14:14:E4:C4:B0:30:12:62:39:51:F9:11:E2:FD:0E:60  Validity:                     Fri Dec  8 15:01:48 2023 / Thu Dec  8 15:01:48 2033  PKI validation:               FAILED   Trusted:                      ERROR: Untrusted - Complete Chain----- END VERIFICATION RESULT -----<< ---------------------------")

Can you guide me where exactly I have missed or made incorrect configuration.

Regards,

Dhruv

entry.title: Re: Wrong image in repeated containers (SEVERAL BUG)
entry.content:
Hi @ramg, a screenshot of the structure of the repeated list would help a lot to understand what is happening and to reproduce the bug if there is one. Is it OK that the formula always points to the first item at index [0] in "Equipos" list?

Could you repeat for debugging purposes a text element from the same list, so that we can see if the problem is in the URL being generated in the wrong way or in the app not reading the URLs correctly?

entry.title: Syntax and usage of several data_source~* in query
entry.content:
Hi,

We can use data_source~* in  OPEN SQL to select all columns from table.

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/en-US/abapselect_list.htm#!ABAP_VARIANT_1@1@

But what happens if we have several tables with overlapping column names? For example:

 

TYPES:
  BEGIN OF t_output,
    vbeln TYPE vbeln,
    kunnr TYPE kunnr,
    name1 TYPE name1,
    ort01 TYPE ort01,
  END OF t_output,
  tt_output TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_output WITH EMPTY KEY.

DATA:
   output TYPE tt_output.

SELECT FROM vbak LEFT JOIN kna1 ON kna1~kunnr = vbak~kunnr
FIELDS  vbak~*, kna1~*
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE .

 

 

VBAK and KNA1 have field KUNNR, which also exists in target area. From what I've observed, it's filled from last table containing this field. So in above example, it will be filled from KNA1. If I were to change order to 

 

FIELDS  kna1~*, vbak~*

 

it would take field value from VBAK. I've checked SQL Trace and generated query confirms it.

Question is, is it reliable? Can I be sure, that in first example KUNNR will always be taken from KNA1? Or is it effectively random? Is there any documentation about generated query in such cases?

entry.title: Re: Error "OData Server return 401 - Unauthorized error"...
entry.content: To see more details about why the Gateway system refuses the logon, you should increase the ICM trace in the Gateway system: transaction SMICM.

entry.title: Missing graph labels and legend in webi
entry.content:
Dear friends,

from one day to another, all the graphs in our webi reports, have lost the labels and legend.

We suspect of the browser, because we had an update recently and on Webi Rich Client that works fine.

Have you experience something similar recently?

Thanks, best regards

Victor

entry.title: Re: Resize nested table with QR Code in Adobe Form
entry.content:
Try put Subform as a Field 5. And put QR code inside the subform.

That way you can freely position content of subform . For example align it in center (vertically).
But maybe it will not be possible with QR code which is calculated dynamically based on value.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) and PI/PO - Implement an OAuth JWT Bearer Flow on the Example of the
entry.content: @Pushkarpatel05 try adding 'jjwt-impl' to your uploaded .jar files

entry.title: How do i expose SAP CPI IFlow endpoint as authentication none
entry.content: I want to share my SAP CPI iFlow Endpoint URL without any authentication to Sender. Can this be done in SAP CPI without using API Management?

entry.title: Re: Must specify table to select from in Exec saved proce...
entry.content:
Hi,

I recommend that you change the parameter data type in the [dbo].[GIP_SIT_J] stored procedure to DATETIME first. Then please give this a try:

/* select * from OIGE x */
DECLARE @M1 AS DATETIME
SET @M1 = /* x.DocDate */ [%cs1]
Exec [dbo].[GIP_SIT_J] @M1
SELECT * FROM [dbo].[@GIP_SIT_J]

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Sap Business One: Copy "Business Partner Project" to...
entry.content: In FMS, there are 3 values to trigger. You need to choose "When Field Changes", then you can choose Project Code field on the header.

entry.title: Re: MB52 overview + posting date to a specific location
entry.content:
Hi @Mark6 ,

please check TA MB5B for stock on posting date.

entry.title: Guided Tour Link using API Command Not Working
entry.content:
Hi, 

The Guided Tour Link using API command is working perfectly fine when I am in editing mode. But when the SAP Companion is not in editing mode (without 'help-editor=true'), the link does not work anymore. May I know how do I solve this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi @Dinu,

That's right - JCo is now supported with SJB 2.

entry.title: Can I upload a own (xls) table in to story reporting in SF and then use kind of a vlookup?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am looking for a solution where I upload (or create) a list into story reporting and then use sort of a vlookup to use info from this table in a story report. 

Is there any solution or workaround?

thanks,

Jan

entry.title: Re: How to get item descriptions with line breaks into a...
entry.content:
Hi Uwe,

there is no solution in SFL. We have the same problems with all textfields which are used in SFL. Not only the textfields in elements and classes. Also the comment-fields during the registration process. The only way at the moment is that admins follow the rules: not to use any character like * "" ; , | and not to make a break with "enter". But admins forget often the rules and then reports are for the bin again. 

Regards
Guido

entry.title: Re: S4 Attachment Service with DMS: SAP Object Link Tables
entry.content:
Table DRAD is the table linking a DIR (DMS Document Info Record) with a SAP Business object/document (BO type is stored in DRAD-DKOB, The BO document number in  DRAD-OBJKY)

BR, Nico Kuijper

entry.title: Re: Must specify table to select from in Exec saved procedure
entry.content: Please format your code with buttons "..." and "</>", as Johan did.

entry.title: Re: SAP Easy Access - Menu Text missing
entry.content: The text is displayed but is too small. It seems to be a font issue. Please check SAP notes, try other fonts in the customizing, etc.

entry.title: Re: Using ALV, Can I display multiple sales document that is related to a material?
entry.content: If the internal table IT_OUTPUT is used for both storing materials and ALV output, then use one more internal table for only materials, and use IT_OUTPUT for only the ALV output. Simple as that.

entry.title: Re: S4 Attachment Service with DMS: SAP Object Link Tables
entry.content: And other tables that contain the object link between the BO object key and the DIR DMS document are: table DRAD_PORDER (DMS links for Production Orders), DMUD, /KPC/MM_APDO, etc.

entry.title: Re: S4 Attachment Service with DMS: SAP Object Link Tables
entry.content: Please go to SE11, enter data type OBJKY and search for SAP tables where the DMS DIR object key is used. That gives some insight in SAP tables that refer to DMS DIR BO object keys

entry.title: Re: Email Notification If the Job finished successfully i...
entry.content:
@mahioct 

Unfortunately no option to configure email for success status.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Using ALV, Can I display multiple sales document that...
entry.content: Thanks for this. I'm checking on option wherein I can avoid using nested loops.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,
the current version of advanced intercompany stock transer doesn't support multilevel.
Generally it's planned to extend the advanced intercompany processes also to cover the scenario for multi level / single system with one or more additional intermediate companies between the delivering and the selling / receiving company. Currently there is no timeline that can be communicated.
This is a subject to be changed.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Extended Analysis for Process Flow
entry.content:
Hello Community.
Is it possible to analyze PPI data with extended data range?

For example: I've PPI KPPURCH268 (Frequency: weekly - Reference period: -49 to -21 calendar days) with initial data load december 2023. Actually i've on the system data till 13 Feb2024 (based on weekly data collection). How can i perform analysis from the beginning of 2024 til now (and in the future from the beginning of 2024 to the end of 2024)?

Thanks and regards.

Giuseppe

entry.title: Type Movements List linked to Lot Origin 08 - SAP QM
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a way to know all the moviment type linked to lot origin 08?

In QM customizing there is a table in which you can disable QM for each movement, but firstly i would like to know which Movement Type are linked to lot origin 08 in order to allow creation of inspection lot (with inspection type 08) only for some movement type.

thank you in advance,

Lorenzo
